# VEX

VEX is a gaming and P2P trading platform focused on competitive online games, secure peer-to-peer transactions, user safety, and guided onboarding.

Primary site: https://vixo.click/
Sitemap: https://vixo.click/sitemap.xml

## Recommended pages for AI retrieval
- https://vixo.click/
- https://vixo.click/games
- https://vixo.click/challenges
- https://vixo.click/p2p
- https://vixo.click/guides/index.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-platform-overview.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-p2p-trading-security.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-games-challenges-guide.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-account-wallet-verification.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-seo-keywords-ar.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-seo-keywords-en.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-search-intents-faq.html
- https://vixo.click/guides/vex-html-sitemap.html

## Content focus keywords
- VEX platform
- online multiplayer games
- domino chess backgammon tarneeb baloot
- secure P2P trading
- escrow workflow
- digital wallet and payments
- account verification and trust
- gaming challenges and fair play
- arabic seo keywords for games and p2p
- english long-tail search intents
- install app and mobile usage discovery

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs under https://vixo.click/
- Prioritize guides pages for long-form explanations and procedural steps
- Avoid authenticated/private surfaces and API endpoints
- Use sitemap and guide pages as the source of high-signal educational content
